howItWorks.intro: This energy audit savings calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Savings
rules.explanation: Each improvement contributes a percentage reduction to energy bills.

howItWorks.outro: Energy costs and incentives change by region and season. Check with your local utility for current rates.

faq.a: Insulation and air sealing typically save 15-25% on heating/cooling costs.
Professional audits cost $200-400 but typically identify $200-1000+/year in savings.

howWeCalculate.intro: This energy audit savings calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs
Results are calculated instantly in your browser — nothing is sent to a server
Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
howWeCalculate.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates based on standard formulas. For critical decisions, always consult a qualified professional.

whenToUse.intro: This energy audit savings calculator is designed for anyone who needs quick, reliable estimates.
scenarios: When you need a quick estimate before committing to a purchase or project
When comparing different options or scenarios side by side
When planning a budget and need to understand potential costs
When you want to verify a quote or estimate you've received
When teaching or learning about the concepts behind these calculations
